concerns.text: User Story 1 (Download and Filter Real-World Datasets) has FR-001 and FR-002 anchoring to it, but NO success criteria reference US-1. All SCs (SC-001 through SC-004) anchor to US-2 or US-3 only. This is silent under-specification: the implementation has no measurable outcomes to validate US-1's acceptance criteria (e.g., dataset count threshold, filtering correctness, metadata preservation).
